content: Climate change impacts will increase the total costs to the Nation’s transportation systems and their users, but these impacts can be reduced through rerouting, mode change, and a wide range of adaptive actions.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Hybrid (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Gli impatti dei cambiamenti climatici aumenteranno i costi totali dei sistemi di trasporto della nazione e dei loro uten
